title: Emergency Contraception * Sexual Assault Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Emergency Contraception * Sexual Assault Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Sexual Assault Issues Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF JACKSON COUNTY SEXUAL ASSAULT RESPONSE TEAM FORENSIC NURSE EXAMINER PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides immediate care by specially trained nurse examiners. This includes medical treatment for sexually transmitted infections or diseases, prophylaxis, and emergency contraception. Domestic violence and strangulation exams are also available. 320 E Main Street #202 Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Individuals who have experienced sexual assault, domestic violence, or strangulation within the past 7 days Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 631-1259 Get Directions Visit Website More Details JACKSON COUNTY SEXUAL ASSAULT RESPONSE TEAM FORENSIC NURSE EXAMINER PROGRAM
